mouth_pose: jaw dropped very wide open, mouth forming a tall round oval, lips stretched taut, tongue lying flat and low along the bottom of the mouth, back of the throat faintly visible, /æ/ low-front vowel articulation
sound_gesture: both paws raised high and open as if astonished, body leaning slightly back
expression: wide amazed eyes, eyebrows raised high, stunned mood

voice.character_description: expressive exclamatory child voice, drawn-out vowels, always sounding amazed

clips.greet: Aaah! What a strong voice! Can you say my sound?
clips.gentle_retry: Drop your jaw. Big open mouth.
clips.friday_acknowledge: Aaah! You mastered me. I am yours!
